title: ixora carnea
intro: Ixora carnea, also known as the red ixora or jungle geranium, is a species of flowering plant native to Southeast Asia and Australia. The medicinal properties of Ixora carnea include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and treating fever. Herbal preparations of Ixora carnea can be made by drying the leaves and flowers, which can then be used to make teas or infusions.
